channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Louisiana House approves map removing racially drawn district
item.description: The GOP-led Louisiana House approved a new congressional map that complies with a Supreme Court ruling but eliminates one district.

item.title: DOJ sues four left-leaning states over license plate policies that hinder federal operations
Federal judge dismisses White House challenge to Boston's sanctuary immigration law
item.description: A federal judge dismissed a lawsuit by the Trump administration challenging a Boston ordinance that limits police cooperation.

item.title: Jeff Bezos rocket explodes in massive fireball; Elon Musk comments on rocket difficulty
